author: Jenkins Chen
description: Connect Obsidian to Pi Coding Agent via the pi-ide protocol: current file, cursor, selection, and edit confirmations. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jenkins Chen
manifest.description: Connect notes to Pi Coding Agent via the pi-ide protocol: current file, cursor, selection, and edit confirmations.
manifest.name: Pi IDE

name: Pi IDE

releases.author: 9963KK
releases.description:
Address second Obsidian directory review feedback.

- Remove plugin name from settings heading
- Remove unused net import
- Remove unnecessary assertion
- Tighten JSON parsing and settings typing
- Avoid empty catch block warnings
- Bump manifest and release assets to 0.1.2

releases.author: 9963KK
releases.description:
Address Obsidian directory review feedback.

- Remove redundant Obsidian wording from manifest description
- Use Setting.setHeading() in settings UI
- Replace builtin-modules with node:module builtinModules
- Use window timer APIs
- Reduce TypeScript unsafe any warnings
- Keep disclosed local filesystem and shell execution for Pi-side package detection/install

releases.author: 9963KK
releases.description:
Initial release of Obsidian Pi IDE.

- Connect Obsidian to Pi Coding Agent via /ide
- Current file, cursor, and selection sync
- Pi edit/write confirmation flow
- Startup check and one-click install for npm:@ldelossa/pi-ide
releases.name: v0.1.0

releases.author: 9963KK
releases.description:
Initial release of Obsidian Pi IDE.

- Connect Obsidian to Pi Coding Agent via /ide
- Current file, cursor, and selection sync
- Pi edit/write confirmation flow
- Startup check and optional install flow for npm:@ldelossa/pi-ide
